title: Codex Continuity Decision Refactor
problem: Codex route continuity decisions are split across HTTP, WebSocket, affinity, and provider execution paths, causing both false 502 risk for ordinary turns and under-protection for WebSocket compact.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core remote_compaction_v2 responses_websocket route_affinity --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core session_route_affinity route_unavailable --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core continuity_domain route_affinity --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core capabilities codex_capability_profile --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: Continue while the lane remains focused on continuity decision unification, soft affinity escape, and explicit continuity domains. Split transport-profile-only work if it grows beyond diagnostics and official OpenAI guidance.
